notes: Generates apps/<name> with .npmrc, package.json, tsconfig, bin, src, test, TARGETS.
Includes a default nix_node_test target (unit) using Vitest; opt out of sample tests with --no-tests.
Pass importer=<id> to override default apps/<name> importer.
TARGETS uses nix_node_cli_bin and requires exactly one lockfile label.
